examples: While you theatergoing butterflies out there keep nattering on about the Tonys — who will win, who should win, and so on — I have been focused on an issue of far greater momentousness and urgency.
The good news, Ms. Linklater noted, is that modern theatergoing is still seen as a respectable proposition, as opposed to the Elizabethan age, when the free-for-all came with the ticket price.
